title: tricostularia zeylanica
intro: Tricostularia zeylanica, also known as Tricostularia, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tricostularia zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Tricostularia zeylanica is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in the treatment of various health conditions.
